---
title: "FAQ"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles_FAQ.css
---

FAQs - Frequently Asked Questions

We've compiled answers to some common questions. If you don't find what you're looking for, please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly!

Jump to a topic:

- [When and Where?](#when-and-where)
- [RSVP & Guest Information](#guest-info)
- [Event Details](#wedding-day-details)
- [Transportation & Parking](#transport)
- [Dress Code & Weather](#dress-code)
- [Gifts](#gifts-registry)
- [Accommodation](#accommodation)
- [Contact & Other Questions](#contact-other-questions)

::: medium-space
:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## When and Where? {#when-and-where}

::: small-space
:::

**When is the party?**\
Saturday, 29th of August, 2026, 4pm onwards.

For anyone who would like to arrive a day early and enjoy some time together before the main event, we will be meeting at the Grain Pub in Zurich (Kirche Fluntern) on Friday evening - 28th of August, for some drinks and snacks from 6pm onwards. Please let us know via the [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) whether you would like to join.

**Where is the party?**\
The main event will be held at Chäsalp, Tobelhofstrasse 236, 8044 Zürich. Find the detailed directions under [location](/location/location.qmd).

:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## RSVP & Guest Information {#guest-info}

::: small-space
:::

**When do I need to RSVP by?**\
Please [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) latest by **1st of July, 2026**. This helps us finalize catering numbers and further planning.

**Can I bring a plus-one?**\
We've carefully curated our guest list based on venue capacity. If your invitation includes "and guest" or names a specific person, they are warmly welcomed. If you're unsure, please contact us!

**Are children welcome?**\
We love your little ones, but we've decided to make our wedding an adults-only celebration. 

**What if I have dietary restrictions?**\
Please indicate any dietary restrictions, allergies, or special meal requirements in your [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) form. The caterers from Chäsalp will do their best to accommodate your needs.

:::

---



::: {.faq-section}

## Event Details

::: small-space
:::

**Friday, 28th August 2026*\
Welcome Drinks @Grain Pub.\
For anyone who would like to arrive a day early and enjoy some time together before the main event, we will be meeting at the [Grain Pub](https://www.grain.ch/) in Zurich (Kirche Fluntern) on Friday evening for some drinks and snacks from **6pm onwards**. Please let us know via the [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) whether you would like to join.\

**Staturday, 29th August 2026**\
Main Event @Chäsalp. See [location](/location/location.qmd).\
*Apéro:* 4pm - 7pm\
*Dinner:* 7pm - 10pm\
*Dancing:* 10pm - open end

:::


---


::: {.faq-section}

## Transportation & Parking {#transport}

::: small-space
:::

**How do I get to the venue?**\
Detailed directions by public transport and car you find under [location](/location/location.qmd).

**Is there parking available?**\
Yes! Chäsalp offers free off-street parking.

**Will there be transportation provided?**\
[Option 1: We will not be providing shuttle service, but taxis and Uber are readily available in the area.]

[Option 2: We will be arranging shuttle service from [location] to the venue. More details will be shared closer to the date.]

:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## Dress Code & Weather {#dress-code}

::: small-space
:::

**What should I wear?**\
Whatever makes you feel "happy and pretty and gaaay"!

**What's the weather like in Zurich at end of August?**\
End of August in Zürich typically has [average temperature] temperatures. We recommend bringing:\

- A light jacket or wrap for the evening
- Comfortable shoes (there may be some walking (optionally running) on uneven surfaces)
- An umbrella just in case

The venue has both indoor and outdoor spaces, so we'll be comfortable regardless of weather!

:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## Gifts

::: small-space
:::

**Can I bring gifts?**\
Having you celebrate with us is what matters most to us — no gifts expected.\ 
For those who would still like to contribute, there will be two optional options at the celebration: a donation to a charitable organization (tbd) and/or a contribution towards our new bed.

:::

---


::: {.faq-section}

## Accommodation

::: small-space
:::

**Where should we stay?**\
If you don't have a place to stay yet, please get in touch with Nadja and/or Dalia.


:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## Contact & Other Questions {#contact-other-questions}

::: small-space
:::

**I have mobility concerns. Is the venue accessible?**\
Please contact Nadja or Dalia to discuss your specific needs.


**I'm traveling from abroad. What do I need to know?**\

....
